origin: Continuity Spike T2.0 brief -> SuperForge diagnostics/stateprobe

rom.mapper: LoROM, SlowROM, 8 KiB battery SRAM, no coprocessor

pattern_function: P(addr, seed) = (lo + 3*mid + 7*hi + seed) & 0xFF over the domain-local address (see README §3 for per-domain address spaces)

vram_words: 0400-07FF (BG2 status grid tilemap — repainted at runtime as a deterministic function of audit state)
dynamic_deterministic_registers: VMADD/OAMADD/CGADD (moved by the audit itself; deterministic per epoch)

echo_protocol.cpu_sends: port1 = seq XOR payload_xor, then port0 = seq
echo_protocol.spc_replies: port3 = payload + spc_count, then port2 = seq
echo_protocol.seq: 1..255 wrapping, never 0; first transaction uses seq 2
echo_protocol.counters: CPU and SPC each keep a rolling count; both increment per successful transaction — a restore that loses either side's state fails domain 11

sabotage_build.purpose: auditor-sensitivity control (continuity C3, in-ROM edition) — NOT a distributed artifact

blind_spots_v0: domains 4/5/6 (ARAM, DSP registers, SPC timers/ports): seeded deterministically SPC-side but not audited until v2; the mailbox echo (domain 11, dual rolling counters) is the only v0 APU-continuity witness
ARAM $00F0-$00FF: underlying RAM bytes unreachable behind the SPC I/O registers; power-on random — a state-sync harness must exclude/normalize

write-only registers with no readable product (HTIME/VTIME, $2181-83, scroll/window/mode/color-math, M7 matrix beyond the A*B product): seeded to documented values, witnessed only via the witness frame

H/V latch contents: re-latched each pass by the domain-10 functional check; pre-restore latch-content survival is v1/v3 material; exact latched values are emulator-deterministic only (hardware phase varies)
PPU version bits ($213E/$213F low nibble): deliberately not asserted (legitimately differ across PPU revisions and emulators)
CGRAM bit 15: not storable (15-bit cells); reads back as PPU2 open bus; baked as 0 and masked by the audit
hardware_behaviors_encoded: VRAM data-port reads return the prefetch buffer and reload from the PRE-increment address: one dummy read after a VMADD write realigns the stream (classic dummy-read pattern; verified empirically on Mesen2)
multiplication sets RDDIVL=WRMPYB, RDDIVH=0 (fullsnes $4202-4203): the domain-8 residue expectation encodes it
the IPL upload entry-command kick byte lingers on APU port 0: the SPC program absorbs it as initial last_seq (uncounted) and the CPU sequence starts at 2 so the first transaction can never collide
auto-joypad read is enabled so $4218-$421F hold deterministic values instead of power-on garbage (capture with no buttons held)
determinism_note: byte-exact state identity at equal epochs holds under deterministic emulation; on hardware, CPU/PPU reset phase and the free-running APU oscillator make cross-boot byte identity unattainable — all audits still pass there (range checks + handshakes)
